name: Syllabus: Pop Quiz
title: Single Target
desc_lv1: Deals Physical DMG equal to 100% of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy.
raw_html_lv1: Deals Physical DMG equal to 100% of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy.

name: Discipline: Final Verdict
title: Blast
desc_lv1: Deals Physical DMG equal to 300% of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to 150% of Evanescia's ATK to adjacent targets. Additionally gains 10 Punchline point(s).
raw_html_lv1: Deals Physical DMG equal to 300% of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to 150% of Evanescia's ATK to adjacent targets. Additionally gains 10 Punchline point(s).

name: Swordsong: Absolution Denied
title: AoE
desc_lv1: Deals Physical DMG equal to 160% of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies, then deals 5 instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Physical DMG equal to 120% of Evanescia's ATK to one random enemy target.
raw_html_lv1: Deals Physical DMG equal to 160% of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies, then deals 5 instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Physical DMG equal to 120% of Evanescia's ATK to one random enemy target.

name: Petalfall: Floral Reminiscence
desc_lv1: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, deals Physical DMG equal to 100% of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and gains 20 point(s) of "Certified Banger."
raw_html_lv1: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, deals Physical DMG equal to 100% of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and gains 20 point(s) of "Certified Banger."

name: Youth: Halcyon Evermore
title: Enhance
desc_lv1:
Evanescia gains Elation equal to 25% of her CRIT DMG. When Evanescia gains Energy, she simultaneously gains an equal amount of "Certified Banger." When Evanescia gains "Certified Banger," she simultaneously gains an equal amount of Energy. The "Certified Banger" gained through this method in a single instance cannot exceed 100 points.
After accumulating 240 Energy, she consumes 240 accumulated amount, and "Master Fox" launches Follow-Up ATK, dealing Physical DMG equal to 100% of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and regenerating 10 Energy for Evanescia. When Evanescia possesses "Certified Banger":
Using her Skill deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 16.0% to the attacked enemy target.
Using her Ultimate deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 24% to all enemies and deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 25% to the enemy target randomly attacked by Ultimate. When Ultimate deals Elation DMG, it takes into account "Certified Banger" at least equal to Max Energy.
"Master Fox's" Follow-Up ATK deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 25% of ATK to all enemies.
raw_html_lv1:
Evanescia gains Elation equal to 25% of her CRIT DMG. When Evanescia gains Energy, she simultaneously gains an equal amount of "Certified Banger." When Evanescia gains "Certified Banger," she simultaneously gains an equal amount of Energy. The "Certified Banger" gained through this method in a single instance cannot exceed 100 points.
After accumulating 240 Energy, she consumes 240 accumulated amount, and "Master Fox" launches Follow-Up ATK, dealing Physical DMG equal to 100% of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and regenerating 10 Energy for Evanescia. When Evanescia possesses "Certified Banger":
Using her Skill deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 16.0% to the attacked enemy target.
Using her Ultimate deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 24% to all enemies and deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 25% to the enemy target randomly attacked by Ultimate. When Ultimate deals Elation DMG, it takes into account "Certified Banger" at least equal to Max Energy.
"Master Fox's" Follow-Up ATK deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 25% of ATK to all enemies.

name: Scarlet: Elation or Execution
title: AoE
desc_lv1: Deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 100% to all enemies and additionally gains 5 point(s) of "Certified Banger".
raw_html_lv1: Deals Physical Elation DMG equal to 100% to all enemies and additionally gains 5 point(s) of "Certified Banger".

name: Watch All Revels
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR A
desc_lv1: Increases Evanescia's CRIT Rate by 30% . When there are 3 or more/2/1 enemy target(s) on the field, her Ultimate's bounce count increases by 1 / 2 / 4 . When a teammate with an Elation Skill Participation ID lower than Evanescia's gains " Certified Banger ," Evanescia converts 50% of it into her own " Certified Banger ."
raw_html_lv1: Increases Evanescia's CRIT Rate by 30% . When there are 3 or more/2/1 enemy target(s) on the field, her Ultimate's bounce count increases by 1 / 2 / 4 . When a teammate with an Elation Skill Participation ID lower than Evanescia's gains " Certified Banger ," Evanescia converts 50% of it into her own " Certified Banger ."

name: Weigh All Truths
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR B
desc_lv1: When "Master Fox" uses an attack, it additionally inflicts Vulnerability on the target, increasing the DMG they take by 12% for 3 turn(s).
raw_html_lv1: When "Master Fox" uses an attack, it additionally inflicts Vulnerability on the target, increasing the DMG they take by 12% for 3 turn(s).

name: Best All Blooms
title: ASCEND CALCULATOR C
desc_lv1: When a teammate's " Certified Banger " ends, Evanescia converts 50% of it into her own " Certified Banger ."
raw_html_lv1: When a teammate's " Certified Banger " ends, Evanescia converts 50% of it into her own " Certified Banger ."
